name: @sheepxux/loop-engineering
description: Agent Skill that compiles vague ideas into verified goals and governed durable loops.
author: sheepxux

scripts.build: npm run build:adapters && npm run build:assets
scripts.validate:examples: node ./bin/loopctl.js validate examples/ci-triage/loop.yaml examples/dependency-update/loop.yaml examples/frontend-qa/loop.yaml examples/finite-project/loop.yaml examples/self-improving-development/loop.yaml
scripts.smoke: npm test && npm run validate:examples && npm run validate:proposals && npm run doctor && node ./bin/loopctl.js skill validate && node ./bin/loopd.js --help && node ./bin/loopctl.js render codex examples/ci-triage/loop.yaml --out /tmp/loop-engineering-codex && node ./bin/loopctl.js render claude-code examples/ci-triage/loop.yaml --out /tmp/loop-engineering-claude
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke
